title: subworkflow - aws ssm eks remediate addon version
description:
Remediation subworkflow to update EKS addon version using AWS Systems Manager automation

Parameters:

clusterName: (Required) EKS cluster name
addonName: (Required) EKS addon name (for example: vpc-cni, coredns, kube-proxy)
addonVersion: (Required) Target addon version
resolveConflicts: (Optional) NONE, OVERWRITE, or PRESERVE
awsregion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection
guide:
## Remediation: Update EKS Addon Version

This subworkflow remediates vulnerable or outdated EKS addons by running AWS-ExecuteAwsApi with eks:UpdateAddon.

### Parameters

- clusterName (Required): EKS cluster name
- addonName (Required): EKS addon name
- addonVersion (Required): Target addon version
- resolveConflicts (Optional): NONE, OVERWRITE, or PRESERVE
- awsregion (Required): AWS region
- dynatraceawsconnection (Required): Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection

### AWS SSM Document

Document Name: AWS-ExecuteAwsApi
API Call: eks:UpdateAddon

### Workflow Logic

1. Start SSM automation to call EKS UpdateAddon
2. Wait for automation completion
3. Fail if final execution status is not Success
